description.value:
grenade, weapon

The item releases a pulse of force upon use. If the item has the area trait, all creatures who fail their save against the item are additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{prone}. Otherwise, a creature damaged by the item is knocked prone unless they succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.abilities.int.mod + ternary(gte(@actor.level, 17), 6, ternary(gte(@actor.level, 9), 4, 2)) + @actor.level + 10)] save against your class DC.

rules.text: A creature damaged by the item is knocked prone unless they succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.abilities.int.mod + ternary(gte(@actor.level, 17), 6, ternary(gte(@actor.level, 9), 4, 2)) + @actor.level + 10)] save against your class DC.
rules.title: Shockwave Pulse
